title: F-143 emergency speeder
content:
{{Top|legends=Emergency firespeeder/Legends}} {{Update|[[Star Wars Helmet Collection 28]]}} {{RepulsorliftVehicle |image=[[File:Firespeeder-SWHC28.png]] |name=F-143 emergency speeder |designer= |manufacturer=[[Rothana Heavy Engineering]]''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia of Starfighters and Other Vehicles]]'' |line= |model=F-143 emergency [[speeder]]{{EncyclopediaCite|Speeders on Land, Sea, and Air (1)}} |type=Speeder''[[Star Wars Journeys: Beginnings]]'' |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length=36 [[meter]]s |width= |height= |mass= |max accel=1,100 [[Kilometer per hour|kph]] |speed= |max alt= |maneuverability= |engine= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen=Equipped''[[Star Wars Complete Vehicles, New Edition]]'' |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament=*Dousers[[Shattered Empire 3|''Shattered Empire'' 3]] *[[Tractor beam projector]] |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew=3 ([[captain]] and two [[pilot]]s) |skeleton= |passengers=Several firefighters |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |availability= |role=Fire suppression |firstuse= |retired= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic]] **[[Coruscant Rescue Ops]] *[[Royal House of Naboo]] }} {{Quote|Fireships to the left and the right.|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi]]|{{Film|III}}}} The '''F-143 emergency speeder''', also known as an '''F-143 firefighting speeder''', '''Coruscant fire suppression ship''', '''emergency firespeeder''', '''emergency fire suppression speeder''', '''firespeeder''', or '''fireship''' (also phrased '''fire ship'''), was a model of [[speeder]] utilized for [[fire]] suppression. ==Characteristics== [[File:FirespeedersInvisibleHand-CineFex102.png|thumb|left|300px|Fireships dousing the ''[[Invisible Hand]]'']] The F-143 emergency speeder was a fire suppression ship manufactured by [[Rothana Heavy Engineering]]. Designed to provide essential disaster relief, these speeders carried several tanks of fire-fighting solutions such as water, foam spray, and fire retardant agents, as well as miscellaneous fuel-specific mixtures on the ship's undercarriage. These fire-fighting solutions were released through pressurized dousers mounted to the vehicle's four wingtips. A [[tractor beam projector]] was fitted below the heat-resistant cockpit to shift debris during emergencies and specialized [[repulsorlift]]s on the exterior assisted the ship's maneuvering thrusters in navigating debris fields. There were also flashing emergency lights and a [[siren]] mounted on the [[hull]] to warn passerby ships of the emergency. The interior was equipped with a medical bay where crewmembers could treat serious injuries quickly, as well as space for multiple firefighters and rescue personnel. A forward [[airlock]] bay had several [[antigrav]] life jackets and [[Environment suit|emergency space suits]] stored and ready to be dropped at a moment's notice. ==History== [[File:FireshipsNaboo-ShatteredEmpire3.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Naboo firespeeders during Operation Cinder]] {{Quote|—Get the dousers on it!''"
"''We need more ''help'' here, mobilize all the fire teams!|Fire teams during the attack on Naboo|}} The [[Galactic Republic]] made use of fireships during the [[Clone Wars]], crewed by members of the [[Coruscant Rescue Ops]] equipped with radiation-proof suits and handheld fire suppression hoses. Several fireships were mobilized in an attempt to put out the flaming wreck of the ''[[Invisible Hand]]'' as it crash-landed on [[Coruscant]] at the conclusion of the [[Battle of Coruscant]]. Fire crews followed the wreck down to an airstrip landing, dousing flames on the hull with their dousers. The [[Royal House of Naboo]] also maintained fire teams, who were mobilized during the [[Galactic Empire|Imperial]] [[Operation: Cinder]] following the [[Battle of Endor]]. The teams' dousers were brought to bear on the fires caused by typhoon-strength storms. ==Behind the scenes== {{Quote|When the ship ''[the Invisible Hand]'' crashes, there can be fireships pouring foam on it.|George Lucas, at a meeting with artists working on ''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith''|''[[The Making of Star Wars Revenge of the Sith]]''}} The emergency fire suppression speeder was conceived on [[February 7]], [[2003]] by [[George Lucas]] for his [[2005]] film [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']]. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars Journeys: Beginnings]]'' {{1stID|emergency fire suppression speeder}} *{{Film|III}} {{1st}} *[[Shattered Empire 3|''Shattered Empire'' 3]] ==Sources== *''[[Ultimate Star Wars]]'' {{SourceContents|issue={{HelmetCollectionCite|28|parent=1}}|contents= *{{HelmetCollectionCite|28|Helmets}} *{{HelmetCollectionCite|28|Highlights of the Saga}} }} *{{BuildFalconCite|46|Starship Fact File}} *''[[Star Wars: The Visual Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia of Starfighters and Other Vehicles]]'' {{1stID|F-143}} *''[[Star Wars: The Complete Visual Dictionary, New Edition]]'' *{{EncyclopediaCite|Speeders on Land, Sea, and Air (1)}} {{1stID|F-143 emergency speeder and F-143 firefighting speeder}} *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia: The Comprehensive Guide to the Star Wars Galaxy]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |fr=Speeder anti-incendie d'urgence F-143 |pl=F-143 }} [[Category:Airspeeder models]] [[Category:Rothana Heavy Engineering products]] [[Category:Vehicle classes of the Galactic Republic]]
